query:
SELECT DISTINCT kd.key
            FROM attribute_kv a
            JOIN device d ON d.id = a.entity_id
            JOIN key_dictionary kd ON kd.key_id = a.attribute_key
            WHERE d.tenant_id = $1
              AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR d.device_profile_id = $2)
            ORDER BY kd.key
            LIMIT 1000
